feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: pm maintenance order document flow
entry.content:
In the PM (Plant Maintenance) module of SAP S/4HANA 2022, I've encountered an issue where, after performing a technical completion (TECO) on a maintenance order, the associated purchase requisition (PR) no longer appears in the document flow. In previous versions, the purchase requisition would still be visible in the document flow even after the maintenance order was technically completed.

  • Is this change in the document flow display after TECO a standard behavior in SAP S/4HANA 2022?
  • Is there any configuration setting that controls the visibility of purchase requisitions in the document flow after a maintenance order is technically completed?
  • How can I ensure that the associated purchase requisition remains visible in the document flow after TECO?

I would appreciate any insights or guidance from the community experts. Thank you very much!

entry.title: why I count see my pr in the document flow after technical completion
entry.content:
In the PM (Plant Maintenance) module of SAP S/4HANA 2022, I've encountered an issue where, after performing a technical completion (TECO) on a maintenance order, the associated purchase requisition (PR) no longer appears in the document flow. Before technical completion, I can see the PR in the document flow, but after technical completion, it disappears. In previous versions, the purchase requisition would still be visible in the document flow even after the maintenance order was technically completed.

  • Is this change in the document flow display after TECO a standard behavior in SAP S/4HANA 2022?
  • Is there any configuration setting that controls the visibility of purchase requisitions in the document flow after a maintenance order is technically completed?
  • How can I ensure that the associated purchase requisition remains visible in the document flow after TECO?

I would appreciate any insights or guidance from the community experts. Thank you very much!

entry.title: Restrict User from Cancel TECO in PM Maintenance Orders
entry.content:
Hello,

I wanna ask about Restrict Several User from Cancel TECO in Maintenance Orders in IW32 after the Maintenance Orders already TECO.

I Already remove BUTA Authorization but still the user can do Cancel TECO.

Is there any Suggestion for restrict that ?

entry.title: Rental of equipments
entry.content:
Hi All,
Maintenance plants A,B&C are there. Where all the equipment(assets) will be maintained in the maintenance plant A. When equipment(vehicles) are required by plant B& plant C they will raise a request , then maintenance plant A will give the equipment to B&C and will charge on a monthly basis.
1.How to map this scenario,it is the construction industry. PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM)

entry.title: unable to release a work order-SAP PM
entry.content:
I am unable to release a PM work order.

Getting this message- Current status does not allow release

Order has a CSER status but I have also tried to release orders without CSER status and I get the same error message.

Message No. /DOW/PP_PM_MSG009

Please help sort this issue.

Thank you. PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) SAP EAM Work Order SAP ERP

entry.title: Order address is not getting updated in PR for service operation
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

We have done config for service operation by having order as priority 1 but the order address is not getting updated in PR. Can you please help us on this. 

Regards, 

Preethi

entry.title: Is there another solution to disallow processing data against organizational functional location
entry.content:
Hello,

I am seeking alternative solutions to the commonly discussed approach of using status management to prevent the creation of processing data (e.g., work orders or notifications) at specific functional locations. Our requirement is to disallow the creation of work orders and notifications at the top two nodes within the FLOC hierarchy.

For context, we recently completed a brownfield implementation and are now running on S/4HANA on-premise. During the implementation phase, I came across official SAP documentation that suggested a different method to address our requirement, but unfortunately, I didn’t save the reference and can no longer locate it.

Could anyone help identify whether this alternative approach is available through a business function or Business Add-In (BAdI)? If possible, I would greatly appreciate a reference to the relevant SAP documentation.

I’m currently in a bit of a bind: SAP has responded to my query with several SAP Notes distinguishing between support and consulting services, while my consultant believes that status management is the only available solution and lacks further knowledge of any alternatives.

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you

entry.title: Plant Abroad functionality in NA
entry.content:
We have implement Plant abroad functionality for EU which is offered by SAP.
We want to implement same for US Company Code. Could you please guide us to achieve the same.

entry.title: add zfields to IW68/IW69 Notifications Itens
entry.content:
Hi SCN,

 

Can we enhance notifications list : IW68/IW69? Itens notification list.

we've used BADI_EAM_SINGLELEVEL_LIST to enhance IW28/IW29 but for IW68/IW69 didn't found any BADI.

Thanks.

Regards,

Maria João Rocha

entry.title: SAP OCI catalog - support SSO integartion
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have received a request from a vendor to to set up an OCI Catalog and they would like SSO integration.

We would like to check if if SAP OCI catalog can support SSO integration if vendor is capable of supporting SSO (SAML).

Any document to guide us will be really helpful.

Looking forward to your assistance.

entry.title: Difference between SAP ECC 6.0 VS What is new in S/4 HANA 2023 on prem Plant maintenance?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My client is going to S/4 2023 and would like to understand what are the new features available on S/4 HANA 2023 in Plant Maintenance Area (Especially with the Fiori). Can someone please throw some light?

Thanks!

entry.title: Delivery Address sequence
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In delivery address sequence we have Ordering party (order partner) and Goods recipient (order partner). Can you please let me know what does Ordering party (order partner) and Goods recipient (order partner) address refers to.

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: PM Master Data Mass Change Program
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings !

I am working on SAP Rise platform . Need to develop program for mass change of Equipment task list including operation , component, packages etc . Can any one please suggest the best method to be followed like using BAPI, BADI etc to develop a program on SAP Rise platform ? 

Thanking you .

Best Regards

Mohammed

entry.title: maintenance plan fixed call date on last day of every month
entry.content:
Hello,

How set and build maintenance plan call date and planned date for every month last date?

entry.title: Attainment for Asset Management for Resource Scheduling S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello Friends

All steps properly followed for scheduling work in FIORI App Maintenance Scheduling Board: set up work center capacities, dispatch planned work orders and freeze schedule, confirm time and close. Attainment seems to be stuck at 0%. Calculation makes sense Attainment % = Work Completed as Planned / Work Planned * 100, advice?

-your SAP friends

entry.title: Cannot cancel business completion since the priority is blank but it is greyed out i cannot fill in
entry.content: user is requesting to reopen a CLSD status Order. Upon reversing the business completion, I cannot save since the Priority is blank. But the Priority field is greyed out I cannot fill in. How to resolve this issue pls.

entry.title: How to move all stock to Quarantine or scrap if we have new revision
entry.content:
Here the business is using ECN and they do revision of materials. If they create a new revision with ECN for one material then the stock of the old revision is to be scrapped or moved to a quarantine storage location. Is there any easy way to do this in background in standard?

Example: I got an iPhone 15. Later I got a new iPhone 16. Now I would like to scrap or move the iphone 15 to quarantine to do rework and convert it to iPhone 16.

Also is there any ongoing production order going on for iPhone 15, I have to hold it and make the change then and there itself.

Any Idea?

entry.title: Create multiple orders in IW31 based on a template
entry.content:
Now I can create only one order in IW31 tcode. 
Need to create multiple orders in IW31 based on a template.  


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issue with field extended in Find Maintenance Order
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement to add an SAP field (Reference Element- ADPSP) in mass editing application F2175(Find Maintenance Orders).

I was able to add a field to the layout by extending the CDS View: C_ObjPgMaintOrder

And the field got added in the report layout.

Using UI Adapt, I added the field inside the button EDIT ORDERS.

Now, when I try to update values, system is not considering the field” Reference Element” for updates. The changed fields are getting passed in the backend through structure "EAM_S_I_A_BOPF_MASS_ORDER_CHG" dynamically. How can we make the field ADPSP changes to pass here?

Please suggest.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: To add an additional field for "Supplier" in Find Maintenance Order and Operation App (F2175)
entry.content:
This app does have a filter "Supplier" in it which refer to the Vendor field in the external data tab, but it does not consider the "Supplier" field which is maintained for the Operation in Services Tab (When the enhanced procurement is set ON), where one operation can have more than one supplier assigned to it.

To achieve the filtering based on the supplier assigned to operations in Services Tab, I want to have an additional field added in this app. From a technical perspective is this a complex task or a simple task where we need to just map OData services to the newly added field.

The end goal is to have a work pack created based on suppliers grouping. And the first step to that is to have display the suppliers assigned to an operation.
